title: Farmer's Delight: Red Onions
description: Ever wanted your onions to be awesomely purple? Then this is the pack for you!
body: So i was watching spongebob and was really impressed by spongebob's cooking prowess, and noticed he was using red onions (which look purple) so i wanted to pretend to be like sponegbob in minecrft with farmer's delight, until i realized the onions there are standard yellow onions, so i made this resource pack.
